type.description: Type of the operation, `proposal` - is used by bakers (delegates) to submit and/or upvote proposals to amend the protocol

id.description: Unique ID of the operation, stored in the TzKT indexer database

level.description: The height of the block from the genesis block, in which the operation was included

timestamp.description: Datetime of the block, in which the operation was included (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)

block.description: Hash of the block, in which the operation was included

period.description: Information about the proposal period for which the proposal was submitted (upvoted)

delegate.description: Information about the baker (delegate), submitted (upvoted) the proposal operation

duplicated.description: Indicates whether proposal upvote has already been pushed. Duplicated proposal operations are not counted when selecting proposal-winner.

quote.description: Injected historical quote at the time of operation
